testcase.name: test_understand_with_products_service_request

failure.message: AssertionError: Invalid ticket_id format: CNC-20260209-0019 assert (False or False or False) + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('TCK-') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('MIRA-') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('REQ-') + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith

testcase.failure: tests/test_picks_tip_signout.py:71: in test_understand_with_products_service_request assert ticket_id.startswith("TCK-") or ticket_id.startswith("MIRA-") or ticket_id.startswith("REQ-"), f"Invalid ticket_id format: {ticket_id}" E AssertionError: Invalid ticket_id format: CNC-20260209-0019 E assert (False or False or False) E + where False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('TCK-') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith E + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('MIRA-') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith E + and False = <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0>('REQ-') E + where <built-in method startswith of str object at 0xfb6757597cd0> = 'CNC-20260209-0019'.startswith
